name: RPlog_When_It_Rains_It_Pours
title: Salty Jack and the Twi'leks of New Kala'uun
summary: At a starport on New Alderaan, the gruff peg-legged Quarren spacer Salty Jack and his Calamari first mate Bill haggle fruitlessly over junk freighters peddled by Chadra-Fan dealers. The green-skinned Twi'lek agent Sayla'kor, who polices the local black market for her family, the Twi'leks of New Kala'uun, intervenes to run the poachers off and lure Jack to her family's compound in the Zhao System. There she shows him clean, in-service freighters and reveals her true offer: rather than credits, she wants an experienced pilot for her family's under-the-table dealings, hinting that careers are made or destroyed at their pleasure. Jack, playing the doddering old sailor while probing for information, deflects and refuses to deal with an unseen organization, exchanging veiled warnings with Sayla'kor as the newly arrived thug Ehlias Cross watches and toys with a vibroknife. No bargain is struck, and Jack takes his leave, promising they may meet again.
